title: How to Share items+subitems between boards and sync changes
excerpt:

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re wondering how to add the same item with subitems to multiple boards and have them sync changes, you’ve reached the right place.

Mirror Item Multiple Boards lets you do exactly that - without setting up complex automations on each board, or cluttering you board with additional connect board columns.

The Problem We Solve -

- Mirror comments and updates from multiple boards to one item

- Add the same item to multiple boards with complete syncing for column values

- Complete subitem sync functionality + updates/replies for subitems

- No more copy-pasting between boards or missing important updates

Key Features

  • Real-time sync - Updates reflect instantly across all boards

  • Selective mirroring - You can choose to exclude certain common columns

  • Subitems included - Mirror items with their full context

  • Updates & files - Comments and attachments sync too

  • Live monitoring - Track all synced items and subitems with the Sync Table

  • If need be you can also Setup automations to not have to manually add each item: like ‘When status changes to something - mirror item to target board target group’ or ‘When item is created - mirror item to Target Board’

Centralize your designs (7)1920×960 218 KB
